"[2] AT 1409 HOURS, I 422'D A SILVER FORD RANGER (92756J3) IN THE GORE POINT OF NB 405, JUST SOUTH OF CULVER. UNABLE TO JUSTIFY TOWING IT FOR 22651B DURING DAYLIGHT HOURS, BUT I FEEL IT WILL BE A HAZARD WHEN IT GETS DARK. CAN WE CREATE A LOG AND HAVE C-WATCH RESPOND TO TOW IT IF IT IS STILL THERE AT THE END OF A-WATCH HOURS ?"
"[2] ^TMC MEDIA LINE IS CLOSED-FOR FURTHER INFORMATION PLEASE CONTACT CHP DISPATCH AT (949) 784-6700"
